tasks.label: Lernikon: Check Docker
tasks.detail: Verifies Docker Desktop is running before booting Supabase.
tasks.command: docker version --format '{{.Server.Version}}' > $null 2>&1; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { Write-Host ''; Write-Host 'Docker Desktop laeuft nicht.' -ForegroundColor Red; Write-Host 'Bitte starte Docker Desktop und fuehre dann den Task "Lernikon: Start All" erneut aus (F1 -> Tasks: Run Task).' -ForegroundColor Yellow; exit 1 } else { Write-Host 'Docker OK' -ForegroundColor Green }

tasks.label: Lernikon: Supabase Start
tasks.detail: Boots local Supabase stack (Postgres, Auth, Studio, Mailpit) in Docker.

tasks.label: Lernikon: Dev Server
tasks.detail: Next.js dev server with Turbopack on http://localhost:3000.

tasks.label: Lernikon: Start All
tasks.detail: Check Docker -> Supabase -> Next dev server. Runs automatically when the folder opens.

tasks.label: Lernikon: Stop All
tasks.detail: Kill Next dev (port 3000) and stop the Supabase containers (data preserved).
tasks.command: npx --yes kill-port 3000 2>&1 | Out-Null; Write-Host 'Next dev gestoppt.' -ForegroundColor Green; npx supabase stop; Write-Host 'Supabase gestoppt.' -ForegroundColor Green
